records.scope: Australian parent information about bronchiolitis in babies up to 12 months
limitations: Thresholds and medicine wording require Australian clinical review
Bronchiolitis-specific content must not be generalized to every respiratory illness

records.scope: Australian parent information about dehydration in babies and children
limitations: Exact fluid volumes are not extracted into reader guidance
Respiratory applicability is indirect for some sections

records.organisation: National Health and Medical Research Council
limitations: Not a complete home-care or triage guideline
